title: coffea dewevrei var. sylvatica
intro: Coffea dewevrei var. sylvatica, also known as Yirgacheffe or Ethiopian wild coffee, is a rare and lesser-known variety of coffee plant native to the highlands of Ethiopia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which may help to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Coffea dewevrei var. sylvatica include potential improvements in cardiovascular health, reduced risk of certain diseases, and enhanced cognitive function. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and extracts, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
